A [[Scorpion/Legends|scorpion]] species was native to [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]] and was preyed upon by a [[Ziost rodent|rodent species]].<ref name="golden3" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 3]] {{1st}}
